tools.name: codegraph_explore
tools.intent: Primary tool for understanding an area, tracing a flow, or answering architecture and bug-orientation questions.
tools.returns: Relevant source grouped by file, plus relationship context when available.
tools.cliFallback: Use codegraph query --json --path <workspace> --limit 20 <terms> to find entry symbols, then inspect the indexed files and lines.
tools.avoidWhen: The user only needs a location list.

tools.name: codegraph_search
tools.intent: Locate symbols by exact or partial name.
tools.avoidWhen: The task needs source code or design understanding.

tools.name: codegraph_node
tools.intent: Inspect one symbol or file in full, including callers/callees trails when available.
tools.returns: One matching symbol or disambiguated matches, optionally with source.
tools.cliFallback: Use codegraph query --json --path <workspace> --limit <n> <symbol>, then open the returned file and line.
tools.avoidWhen: Several related symbols or a whole area are needed.

tools.name: codegraph_callers
tools.intent: Find functions, methods, or classes that call a symbol.
tools.avoidWhen: The user asked for a whole flow; use explore instead.

tools.name: codegraph_callees
tools.intent: Find functions or methods called by a symbol.
tools.avoidWhen: The user asked for a whole flow; use explore instead.

tools.name: codegraph_impact
tools.intent: Estimate refactor blast radius or affected symbols.
tools.avoidWhen: The task is just opening a result.

tools.name: codegraph_files
tools.returns: File tree or flat file list with language/symbol counts.
tools.avoidWhen: The user asks about a symbol relationship.

tools.name: codegraph_status
tools.intent: Check index health, file/node/edge counts, and pending sync state.
tools.avoidWhen: The user asks a code question and the index is already active.

fallbackOrder: Use registered Codegraph MCP tools when available.
If MCP is unavailable and .codegraph exists, use Codegraph CLI commands.
Use grep/read only when Codegraph MCP and CLI are both unavailable or the workspace is not indexed.
triggerExamples: 이걸 바꾸면 영향 받는 곳 찾아줘
